description: Describes a method of a service.

^(client_streaming)$.description: Identifies if client streams multiple client messages

^(input_type)$.description:
Input and output type names.  These are resolved in the same way as
 FieldDescriptorProto.type_name, but must refer to a message type.

^(server_streaming)$.description: Identifies if server streams multiple server messages

Input and output type names.  These are resolved in the same way as
 FieldDescriptorProto.type_name, but must refer to a message type.

serverStreaming.description: Identifies if server streams multiple server messages

title: Method Descriptor Proto
